channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Latest on U.S.-Iran peace deal talks as Trump and Tehran share updates
item.description: Progress appears to be made in negotiations between the U.S. and Iran, but a final peace deal may still take time. CBS News' Aaron MacLean...

item.title: California chemical leak no longer poses immediate explosion risk, officials say
item.description: Authorities stated that the threat of a major explosion from a chemical leak in Orange County has been removed for now. CBS News Los Angeles' Tina ...

item.title: Iran live updates: Trump honors troops killed in Iran conflict during Memorial Day speech
item.description: President Donald Trump announced "major combat operations" against Iran on Feb. 28, with large-scale joint U.S.-Israeli strikes.

item.title: Iran says obstacles remain but acknowledges a deal with the U.S. is taking shape
item.description: While the Trump administration signals hope for a deal, Iran says obstacles persist and "frequent changes" in U.S. positions are not helpful.
